what_it_does: Records a channel attachment entry that associates attachment att-9dfafac9 with board item item-b475e9b9 in the dragnet-development channel.
observations: The file consists entirely of YAML frontmatter with no body content.
It declares attachment_type 'board_items' and a target URI board://item-b475e9b9.
It records an exact UTC timestamp for when the attachment was added.
standouts: The target is a board:// URI, making this a cross-entity reference rather than a file attachment.
The attachment type 'board_items' suggests a classification or tagging substrate for board entries.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with an 'id' matching the filename.
References external entities with a URI scheme (board://...).
concerns: The file contains no descriptive text or context beyond the link, so its purpose is opaque without external board item data.
No versioning or author metadata is recorded.
notes: This is a minimal attachment-to-board-item linkage record in the dragnet-development channel memory.
questions: What content or artifact does attachment att-9dfafac9 represent?
What is the semantic role of board item item-b475e9b9?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated as a board_items attachment targeting a board item; actual content is exactly that metadata link, so it matches.
intention_signals: To create a durable, discoverable association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later traversal or context reconstruction.
contribution: Provides a typed, timestamped edge between an attachment identifier and a board item URI, supporting graph-style navigation in the channel memory ledger.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML attachment metadata record linking attachment att-9dfafac9 to board item item-b475e9b9 in the dragnet-development channel.
intention_for_embedding: To persist a typed association from a channel attachment to a board item for retrieval and cross-referencing.
